concepts.title: Brownian Motion
concepts.tldr: Continuous adapted $(W_t)_{t \ge 0}$, $W_0 = 0$, with increments $W_t - W_s \sim \mathcal{N}(0,(t-s)I_d)$ independent of $\mathcal{F}_s$.

concepts.title: Stochastic Differential Equation
concepts.tldr: $dX_t = b(X_t)\,dt + \sigma(X_t)\,dW_t$, $X_0 = x$; unique strong solution when $b, \sigma$ are Lipschitz.

concepts.title: Itô's Formula
concepts.tldr: $du(t,X_t) = (\partial_t u + \mathcal{A}u)\,dt + \nabla u^{\mathsf{T}} \sigma\,dW_t$ for $u \in C^{1,2}$ — the chain rule of stochastic calculus.

concepts.title: Martingale
concepts.tldr: Adapted, integrable $(M_t)$ with $\mathbb{E}[M_t \mid \mathcal{F}_s] = M_s$ for $s \le t$ — conditionally constant, hence constant in expectation.

concepts.title: Black–Scholes Equation
concepts.tldr: $\partial_t u + rS\,\partial_S u + \tfrac{1}{2}\Sigma^2 S^2\, \partial_S^2 u - ru = 0$, $u(T,S) = g(S)$ $\;\Rightarrow\;$ $u = e^{-r(T-t)}\,\mathbb{E}[g(S_T) \mid S_t = S]$.
